reviews.comment:
Buena atención!!!! Lindo lugar... limpio

(Translated by Google)
Great service! Nice place... clean
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJa1kyRHpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala predisposición, una vez que cargaste combustible pasas a molestarles, mucha full para que? Estás cosas hacen que te borres del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Very bad attitude. Once you've filled up your tank, you start bothering them. What's the point? These things get you banned from the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3Ml91eVJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Son unos profesionales mientras que te cargan ni te preguntan directamente te limpian los vidrios y te consultan como estan y si necesitas calentar el agua para el mate

(Translated by Google)
They're professionals; while they're charging you, they don't even ask questions, they just clean the windows and ask how you are and if you need to heat water for your mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3eWNIUV9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre pasamos .. y los cafes que me sirven siempre me reviven para el tramo final o para seguir viaje .. muy buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
We always stop by... and the coffees they serve me always revive me for the final stretch or to continue my journey... very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3aHBPWTRBRRAB
